original text:
If any of these organizations interest you, email us at socialinnovation@fordham.edu and we will connect you.
Overview: Students for Fair Trade promotes a social justice approach to business and commerce.
Overview: SEAJ seeks to engage Fordham students in issues of environmental consciousness affecting Fordham University, the greater Bronx and NYC community, and our global environment. If this interests you, email us at socialinnovation@fordham.edu and we will connect you.
Overview: Fordham Net Impact represents a new generation of business leaders who want to use their careers to solve the world's toughest sustainability challenges.
Overview: Good Mornings is a monthly breakfast series highlighting NYC community leaders in social innovation.
Overview: Model United Nations is an academic simulation of the United Nations that aims to educate participants about current events, diplomacy and the UN agenda.
Overview: The Sustainability Committee is a facet of United Student Government that is focused on improving sustainability efforts at Fordham as well as educating the Fordham community.
Overview: The Social Innovation Collaboratory Communications Team works to promote and develop the public face of the FSIC.
Overview: The Social Impact 360 Fellowship is a one-year program that identified the most passionate first-year undergraduates ar schools around the country inspires them to start a social venture, and empowers them to solve the world's greatest problems with socially-conscious business.
Overview: St. Rose's Garden is an organic, raised bed, on-campus community garden that serves as a social space, living laboratory, and classroom.
Overview: Relay for life is a fundraiser for the American Cancer Society.
Overview: Operation Smile raises funds and awareness for medical missions to provide life-saving and life-changing reconstructive surgeries to impoverished children around the world who are born with cleft lip and cleft palate.
Overview: Fashion for Philanthropy is a club that merges Jesuit ideals with the apparel and textile business to generate funds to donate to different philanthropic organizations.They collaborate with sponsors to raise money to donate to the Make-A-Wish Foundation of New York, while also learning more about the world of fashion.
